name: Chicken #t Cheese Crescent Chimachangas
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Grease a large cookie sheet.
3. In a large skillet, cook onion and garlic in oil until the onion is tender.
4. Add chicken; cook over low heat until thoroughly heated, stirring occasionally. Remove from heat.
5. Separate dough into 8 rectangles and firmly press perforations to seal.
6. Spread 2 tablespoons of the salsa on each rectangle, leaving at least half an inch of space near the edge.
7. Stir 1 cup of the cheese into the chicken mixture.
8. Spoon heaping 1/3 cup of chicken mixture onto half of each rectangle.
9. Starting at the shortest side of the rectangle with chicken, roll up tightly and pinch the ends to seal.
10. Place the rolls seam-side down on the greased cookie sheet.
11. Bake in the oven at 350°F for 16 to 21 minutes, or until golden brown. Remove from the oven.
12. Top each roll with about 2 tablespoons of the remaining cheese.
13. Return the rolls to the oven and bake for an additional 1 to 2 minutes, or until the cheese is melted.
14. Serve with sour cream and additional salsa.
